mapper.insert: insert into nh_community_like (user_id, target_type, target_id, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, now())
mapper.delete: delete from nh_community_like where user_id = #{userId} and target_type = #{targetType} and target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.insert: insert into nh_community_collect (user_id, topic_id, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{topicId}, now())
mapper.delete: delete from nh_community_collect where user_id = #{userId} and topic_id = #{topicId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from nh_community_like where target_type = #{targetType} and target_id = #{targetId}
select count(*) from nh_community_collect where topic_id = #{topicId}
